title: Wardelon's Tools
description: This resource pack will rework the tools and not only in the game. Their textures will become fresher, and animation will also appear. Some things were remade in 3D, for example the mace.
body:
This resource pack will rework the tools and not only in the game. Their textures will become fresher, and animation will also appear. Some things were remade in 3D, for example the mace.

The [telegram](https://t.me/djakyziWarda) channel has a lot of interesting information, screenshots and early access to resource packs!
